{"query":"Wicked For Good trailer first 24 hours views","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1537,"verdict":null,"extra_info":{"type":"featured_snippet","text":"Universal has reported the first trailer for 'Wicked: For Good' was viewed 113 million times in its first 24 hours.Jun 9, 2025"},"results":[{"url":"https://variety.com/2025/film/news/wicked-for-good-trailer-views-113-million-24-hours-1236422564/","title":"'Wicked: For Good' Trailer Launches to 113 Million Views in 24 Hours","content":"‘Wicked: For Good’ Trailer Launches to 113 Million Views in 24 Hours, Surpassing the First Film’s 75 Million (EXCLUSIVE)
Universal, the studio behind the Broadway adaptation, has reported the first look at the second half of “Wicked” was viewed 113 million times in its first 24 hours.
For reference, Marvel’s “Deadpool and Wolverine” trailer holds the record for biggest trailer launch with 365 million views in 24 hours.
Universal began to drum up excitement a day earlier, releasing a teaser on Instagram in collaboration with Elphaba and Glinda themselves, Cynthia Erivo and Ariana Grande, as well as Jonathan Bailey (Fiyero), Michelle Yeoh (Madame Morrible) and Jeff Goldblum (The Wizard of Oz)."},{"url":"https://www.today.com/video/-wicked-for-good-trailer-views-outpace-first-movie-s-preview-241249349588","title":"‘Wicked: For Good’ Trailer Views Outpace First Movie’s Preview","content":"Today Show · TODAYhttps://www.today.com · Jun 10, 2025Today Show · TODAYhttps://www.today.com · Jun 10, 20251:09The trailer for upcoming “Wicked” sequel, which hits theaters in 164 days, has been viewed 113 million times in the first 24 hours.
The trailer for upcoming “Wicked” sequel, which hits theaters in 164 days, has been viewed 113 million times in the first 24 hours, outpacing the preview for last year’s preview which received around 75 million views in its first day.June 10, 2025"},{"url":"https://www.broadwayworld.com/article/WICKED-FOR-GOOD-Trailer-Achieved-113-Million-Views-Within-24-Hours-20250609","title":"WICKED: FOR GOOD Trailer Achieved 113 Million Views Within 24 Hours","content":"According to Variety, the official trailer for Wicked: For Good achieved a whopping 113 million views in its first 24 hours, following its premiere last week.
These trailer numbers place the sequel on par with other recent blockbusters such as Greta Gerwig's Barbie, Beetlejuice Beetlejuice, and Mufasa: The Lion King.
The trailer offers viewers a sneak peek at significant scenes from the upcoming film, including Glinda's wedding, Dorothy's arrival and the iconic song from which the movie borrows its title, "For Good."
Wicked: For Good, the conclusion of the film adaptation, picks up after the 2024 blockbuster.
Wicked: For Good will hit theaters on November 21, 2025, and stars Cynthia Erivo as Elphaba, Ariana Grande as Glinda, Jonathan Bailey as Fiyero, Jeff Goldblum as The Wizard, Michelle Yeoh as Madame Morrible, Ethan Slater as Boq, and Marissa Bode as Nessarose."},{"url":"https://collider.com/wicked-for-good-trailer-views-113-million-24-hours/","title":"‘Wicked: For Good’ Is Already Breaking Records","content":"Britta DeVore is a Senior Author for Collider who has been known to dabble with Reality News as well.
Variety reports that, after tallying the numbers, Universal is celebrating an incredible milestone, as the debut teaser for the second half of the musical film has racked up 113 million views within its first 24 hours.
Still, Wicked: For Good’s official trailer will certainly have some catching up to do if it wants to overtake the record for biggest launch.
That bragging right is currently held by Marvel’s Deadpool and Wolverine, which easily shoved its competition off a cliff thanks to its staggering 365 million views in 24 hours."}]}
